finding_results.notes: Separated role-based registers under pressure: Alonzo now speaks in rent/job-risk concrete terms, Calvin in paycheck/family-loss terms, Lena mixes procedural protection language with a clipped hard beat, and Cora stays polished in media-control logistics.

summary: Dialogue idiolect convergence was resolved by differentiating worker, detective, and PIO cadence/lexicon while preserving scene stakes and continuity.
